Aries.overview: The Moon in Aries moves through your solar 1st house today, emphasising identity, vitality, and first impressions. We are in a Waning Gibbous phase — the sky favours editing, completion, and quieter integration. Transiting Mars squares your Aries Sun — productive friction; adjust pace rather than forcing a clean win.
Aries.love: Your presence is the attraction — confidence without performance draws the right kind of attention. Venus in Libra colours affection and aesthetics — lead with sincerity over spectacle.
Aries.career: Professional visibility is activated — deliver one polished piece of work and let competence speak. Mars in Cancer sets the pace of effort — direct drive wisely, not impatiently.
Aries.health: Recovery and release are favoured — sleep, hydration, and fewer inputs restore clarity. The Moon's passage through your 1st house suggests tending identity, vitality, and first impressions supports body-mind balance.
Aries.weekly: This week the Moon travels through Aries, Taurus, Gemini relative to the sky. Jupiter in Leo (your solar house 5) expands romance, creativity, and wholehearted play. Saturn in Aries asks for patience in identity, vitality, and first impressions. For your personal chart, open transits.html.
Aries.methodNote: Solar-chart horoscope: whole-sign houses from your Sun sign, computed from VSOP87 ephemeris at local noon. For your full natal chart see transits.html.

transits.text: Transiting Mars squares your Aries Sun — productive friction; adjust pace rather than forcing a clean win.
Transiting Jupiter trines your Aries Sun — cooperative sky weather that eases effort in that area.
Transiting Saturn conjoins your Aries Sun — concentrated focus; one theme dominates the day.
